sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103704" key="texnh/mwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεχν-ήμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <sense id="n103704.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cunningly wrought</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">αὐλοί</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.504</biblScope></bibl></cit>. </sense> <sense n="2" id="n103704.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">skilful</tr_>, of artists, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:326" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.326</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
